extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked 4km from the summit of Col de la Colmiane, held off IZAGIRRE Ion and TEUNS Dylan to win and take yellow
tactical_patterns: Mitchelton-Scott positioned Yates perfectly throughout entire stage to preserve energy, then launched him with 4km remaining on Colmiane.
Sky and Astana rode together at peloton front to control breakaway gap, revealing potential coalition against GC threats.
Seven-man breakaway with Gallopin, De Marchi, Roche failed despite 3-minute gap, caught before final 13km showing insufficient firepower.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: first summit finish victory signals new climbing level beyond previous seventh on Alpe d'Huez/ninth on Colmiane baseline
rider_signals.SANCHEZ Luis Leon: negative: lost over 4 minutes on Colmiane after intermediate sprint, dropped from GC top 10 entirely
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: BMC rider limited losses to winner by only 11 seconds despite not initiating the decisive move
rider_signals.IZAGIRRE Ion: positive: followed Yates' 4km attack closely, lost only 12 seconds to take second on GC
